part.Name: Description
part.Short: Embers crackle in a stone oven, carved into the wall of the den. Pretty stones, dried flowers, and an empty tea kettle decorate the mantle. Warmth and promises of full bellies radiate from the beating heart of the fire.

part.Name: Description
part.Short: Blood-crusted wax and flame-licked goatskin portray their three subjects: a snarling beast, a monstrous serpent, and the iron bond you and fate have forged.
